summary: Brief hardened: verified app custom nodes are also NOT pinned (branch zips, dependencies.js:144-217) — scope now requires pinning BOTH app + image to same commit set.
Scope broadened: goal = node version-lock both local app + RunPod respect; HARD constraint land on RunPod branch only (not master); added lock-system design options A/B/C; retitled.

Goal expanded to 3 locks (core + frontend + nodes) across local+CI; added frontend pin to scope (1b); added build-pod-image command-revision deliverable; added rebuild-handoff sequence (land lock+command first, rebuild after).
Added follow-up hint pointing to MPI-118 (app ComfyUI bump to 0.25.0); lock must be built bump-ready.

Added RES4LYF as a lock case: tagless repo (no tags/releases) so SHA-pin only (419de2d); lock file must support {repo,commit}; RES4LYF is a NEW app dep to add SHA-pinned when lock lands, template for re-pinning the other 7. Defer code to MPI-117.

Lock-source design refinement: per-node source (Comfy Registry version / GitHub tag / GitHub SHA). MpiNodes publishes 11 registry versions (latest 1.1.1) — lock by registry version; RES4LYF not in registry+no tags = SHA. Lock file needs a source discriminator. Added per-node source-resolution action.
Picked up MPI-117; plan written; decisions: static-import+resolver, 7 universal packs + RES4LYF, agent resolves pins.

Lock mechanism code-complete on RunPod branch. dev_configs/node_lock.json (per-node source: git-commit/registry/git-tag; core v0.19.3+frontend 1.42.11). App: dependencies.js imports lock+lockUrl(); 7 packs pinned + RES4LYF added. Pod: Dockerfile COPYs lock + python source-resolver loop; COMFYUI_REF master->v0.19.3; CI default + README + /build-pod-image command (derive ref from lock, sync lock into mpi-ci ctx) updated. Verified: extract/rename commit-safe, all urls pinned, lock in sync. Rebuild+parity = separate handoff step.

PARKED in doing — BLOCKED ON: v0.5.0 Pod image rebuild (batched w/ MPI-118). Lock mechanism code-complete; MPI-118 bumped its core/frontend values to v0.25.1/eca4757/1.45.15/templates 0.10.0. Next session: run /build-pod-image (cu124+cpu CI + cu128 local), GHCR-public, RunPod template bump, POD_IMAGE update, parity-test. MPI-117 + MPI-118 BOTH close with that one rebuild.
